title: OCS/GCS qquota schema
description: Schema describing the JSON output of qquota including active resource limits and the effective resource quota rule filters as reported by the command.

quota_usage.description: List of effective quota usages or static quota limits reported by qquota.

nameList.description: List of filter entries as reported by qquota. Entries are not expanded and may contain names, wildcard patterns, exclusions, ACL names, or host group names depending on the filter type.

rqs_name.description: Name of the resource quota set.

rule_name.description: Name or ordinal identifier of the resource quota rule within the resource quota set.

resource.description: Name of the resource for which the quota is defined.

used.description: Amount of the resource currently used if the resource is consumable. Omitted for static or non-consumable limits.

max.description: Maximum allowed amount of the resource if consumable, or static limit if non-consumable.

users.description: User filter entries as reported by qquota. Entries are not expanded and may contain user names, ACL names, wildcard patterns, or exclusions.

projects.description: Project filter entries as reported by qquota. Entries are not expanded and may contain project names, wildcard patterns, or exclusions.

pes.description: Parallel environment filter entries as reported by qquota. Entries are not expanded and may contain PE names, wildcard patterns, or exclusions.

queues.description: Cluster queue filter entries as reported by qquota. Entries are not expanded and may contain queue names, wildcard patterns, or exclusions.

hosts.description: Host filter entries as reported by qquota. Entries are not expanded and may contain host names, host group names, wildcard patterns, or exclusions.
